hero.title: Take back control of your budget
hero.subtitle: Track your income and spending without stress. The 50/30/20 rule automatically guides you toward calm, lasting money management.
hero.trustIntro: Join those who found financial peace of mind

heroSimple.title: Peace in your budget
heroSimple.subtitle: Track your income and spending, split automatically with the 50/30/20 rule, and move calmly toward your goals.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: A suite of simple, powerful tools, designed for mental clarity.

items.title: 3-step onboarding
items.description: Enter your income and the 50/30/20 envelopes are calculated automatically. Zero configuration.

items.title: Quick expense entry
items.description: Log an expense in under 10 seconds. Focus, amount, category, done.

items.title: Visual budget tracking
items.description: Calm progress bars that show where you stand, without guilt.

items.title: Custom budgets
items.description: Create goals (holidays, emergency fund) and track them in real time.

items.title: Monthly navigation
items.description: Explore your past months' spending. Full history, always accessible.

items.title: Light/dark theme
items.description: The app adapts to your preference. Read comfortably anytime.

benefits.title: The 50/30/20 rule explained
benefits.subtitle: A simple, proven framework for a balanced financial life.

items.title: 50% — Essentials
items.desc: Housing, food, transport, health. The foundation that doesn't change.

items.title: 30% — Leisure
items.desc: Restaurants, outings, holidays, culture. Joy and experiences.

items.title: 20% — Savings
items.desc: Emergency fund, investments, long-term projects. Your future.

benefits.list1: It's easy to remember and set up — no complex math.
benefits.list2: It balances pleasure and safety — you don't deprive yourself, you invest.
benefits.list3: It adapts to any income — what matters is the proportion, not the absolute figure.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you wanted to know, without fear.

items.a: Kōza is 100% free. No subscription, no limit, no ads. It's a gift.
Yes. Your data is stored in an encrypted PostgreSQL database. No bank integration, no third parties. Just you and your data.

items.q: Can I add other income sources?
items.a: Absolutely. You can declare a main salary, freelance income, dividends — whatever you want. The envelopes recalculate automatically.

items.q: What happens if I go over budget?
items.a: Nothing. No guilt, no red alarm. Kōza notifies you gently and carries the surplus over to the next month. It's help, not judgement.
Yes. You can freely browse your history to see your trends, compare months and learn from your habits.
Of course. One click and you get a JSON of all your data. It's your data, you keep it.

cta.title: Ready to take back control?
cta.subtitle: Join those who transformed their relationship with money. Onboarding takes 3 minutes.
cta.note: 💳 Free, no commitment, no credit card required.

footer.tagline: Zen budget management based on the 50/30/20 rule.

easterEgg.name: Joseline
easterEgg.subtitle: Aqua Unicorn Joseline 🌊✨
easterEgg.instruction: Click Joseline or the background to leave

onboarding.welcomeBody: kōza splits your income with the 50 / 30 / 20 rule: half for essentials, 30% for leisure, 20% for savings. A clear budget, no pressure.
onboarding.setupBody: Add your main income source. You can add others or skip this step.
onboarding.confirmBody: From {amount} of income, here's your 50 / 30 / 20 split.
onboarding.confirmBodyEmpty: You can add your income whenever you like. Here's how kōza will split it.

dashboard.noIncomeBanner: Add your income to see your 50/30/20 goals.
dashboard.carryNegative: Carryover from last month: {amount} to absorb

incomes.summaryEmpty: Add your income sources to see your envelopes.
incomes.empty: No income for this month. Add your first source to see your envelopes.
incomes.deleteMessage: “{source}” will be removed from this month.

expenses.empty: No expenses this month. Add your first expense.
expenses.deleteMessage: “{description}” will be removed from this month.

budgets.empty: No budgets yet. Create your first goal.
budgets.deleteMessage: “{name}” will be deleted. Linked expenses will be unlinked, not deleted.

recurring.pageSubtitle: Your charges that come back every month, quarter or year.
recurring.empty: No recurring expenses. Add your fixed or variable charges.
recurring.deleteMessage: “{label}” will no longer generate expenses. Past expenses are kept.
recurring.pendingBanner: Some variable recurring expenses need confirming.

notifications.savingsGoalNear: Just {amount} left for {name} — you're almost there!
notifications.budgetOver: {name} budget exceeded — it happens, the surplus carries over.
notifications.categoryOver: Your {category} spending is over this month's target.

auth.toLogin: Already have an account? Log in
auth.emailTaken: An account already exists with this email.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy of the kōza application
privacy.s1Body: kōza respects your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data when you use our application.
privacy.s2Intro: We collect the following types of data:
privacy.s2Item1: Budget data: income, expenses, categories, custom budgets you enter
privacy.s2Item3: Access data: IP address, browser type, pages visited (via anonymised server logs)
privacy.s2Outro: We do not collect: email, phone number, direct banking information (we don't integrate with banks).
s3Items: Provide the service (store and display your budgets and expenses)
Maintain the security and stability of the service
privacy.s4Body1: Your data is never shared, sold or transferred to third parties. No advertising, no data brokers, no profiling. It's simple: your data belongs to you.
privacy.s4Body2: Exception: we may be required to disclose data if the law requires it (court order, etc.).
privacy.s5Intro: We take the security of your data seriously. Your data is:
s5Items: Stored in an encrypted PostgreSQL database (Prisma Postgres)
Accessible only by your browser (no tracking cookies)
privacy.s5Outro: Although we have implemented reasonable security measures, no system is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s6Body: kōza does not use tracking or advertising cookies. We may use minimal technical cookies to remember your preferences (theme, language) — only on your device, never across other sites.
s7Items: View all your data via the JSON export
Edit or delete your data at any time in the app
Request the complete deletion of your account
privacy.s8Body: Your data is kept as long as you use kōza. If you delete your account, all associated data will be erased within 30 days.
privacy.s9Body: kōza complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). If you are an EU user, you have the right to access, rectify, delete and port your data.
privacy.s10Body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated through the application. Your continued use of kōza after a change constitutes your acceptance.
privacy.s11Body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at:

terms.metaDescription: Terms of use of the kōza application
terms.s1Body: By accessing and using kōza, you agree to comply with these terms of use and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not accept these terms, please stop using the service immediately.
terms.s2Body: kōza grants you a limited, non-exclusive, revocable and non-transferable licence to access and use the application for personal, non-commercial purposes. You may not reproduce, distribute, transmit or exploit kōza's content without prior written authorisation.
terms.s3Body: All kōza content, including text, graphics, logos and images, is protected by copyright. © 2026 kōza. All rights reserved. You may download your personal content for your personal use only.
terms.s4Body1: kōza is provided "as is" without any warranty, express or implied. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness or usefulness of the information provided by the application. Financial guidance should not be considered professional advice.
terms.s4Body2: We disclaim all liability for financial losses, indirect damages or any other harm resulting from the use of kōza.
terms.s5Body: In no event shall kōza be liable for direct, indirect, special, incidental or punitive damages arising from your use of the application, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.
terms.s6Body: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time, with or without notice. We shall not be liable to you or any third party for any modification, suspension or discontinuation of the service.
terms.s7Body: You are responsible for all data you submit to kōza. You warrant that you have the right to submit this data and that it does not violate any law or third-party right. You retain full ownership of your data.
terms.s8Intro: You must not use kōza to:
s8Items: Access another user's account without permission
Harass, threaten or intimidate other users
Send spam or unsolicited advertising content
terms.s9Body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to kōza if we determine, at our sole discretion, that you have violated these terms or applicable law.
terms.s10Body: These terms of use are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of France, without regard to its conflict of law principles.
terms.s11Body: We reserve the right to modify these terms of use at any time. You are responsible for regularly reviewing these terms. Your continued use of kōza after any change constitutes your acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.s12Body: If you have any questions about these terms of use, please contact us at:
